32.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "I'd like to get a photographer to cover our event" — anh ấy gọi để thuê nhiếp ảnh gia cho sự kiện từ thiện.

33.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "unfortunately Thomas doesn't usually work evenings" — sự kiện diễn ra buổi tối thứ Ba (Tuesday night), tức thời gian yêu cầu quá muộn.

34.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "Let me talk to him. He might make an exception" — cô ấy sẽ nói chuyện với nhân viên Thomas.

35.explanation: Họ nói về việc "package all of them" và "pack that big shipment for the Henderson order" — đóng gói đơn hàng, tức đang ở trong nhà kho (warehouse).

36.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "I'll call Maria Jeong and ask if she can come in early today to help" — Maria có thể giúp đỡ công việc đóng gói.

37.explanation: Người phụ nữ bảo "We also have to pack that big shipment for the Henderson order... Do that first" — người đàn ông sẽ đóng gói đơn hàng trước tiên.

38.explanation: Họ nói "we still need to decide where to go for Saturday's closing dinner" — cần chọn địa điểm cho bữa tối bế mạc.

39.explanation: "McNally's is close by... that would be convenient. We could even walk there from the hotel" — họ thích vì nhà hàng ở gần.

40.explanation: Người phụ nữ đề nghị "I could see if they can offer us a reduced catering rate" — thảo luận phương án giá cả.

41.explanation: Câu mở đầu "could you give me an update on how our new medical records software is coming" — công ty làm phần mềm (software).

42.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "Having their feedback at every stage of the process has been helpful" — phản hồi của khách hàng rất hữu ích.

43.explanation: "we're on schedule for completing our beta version, then we can hand it off to our marketing team" — bước tiếp theo là chuyển sản phẩm cho một nhóm khác trong công ty.

44.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "I'm following up to make sure that you're pleased with the job our workers did in your house" — gọi để kiểm tra mức độ hài lòng của khách hàng.

45.explanation: Khi được hỏi về thay tủ bếp, anh ấy trả lời "We don't, but I can recommend a company I often work with" — công ty anh ấy không làm loại việc đó.

46.explanation: Anh ấy nói "Let me get their phone number, one second" — sẽ tìm số điện thoại (của công ty khác) cho người phụ nữ.

47.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "I refill my medication here at this pharmacy once a month" — cuộc hội thoại diễn ra tại hiệu thuốc.

48.explanation: Cô ấy nói về bác sĩ: "I'll give her a call during my lunch break today" — sẽ gọi cho bác sĩ vào giờ nghỉ trưa.

49.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "once we receive your doctor's prescription, we can deliver the medication directly to your home" — đề nghị sắp xếp giao hàng.

50.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "I'm calling from West End High School... for our student baseball teams" — cô ấy làm việc tại trường học.

51.explanation: Cô ấy nói "We have budget restrictions though" — lo ngại về tổng chi phí.

52.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "Let me get the manager on the phone and you can discuss the specifics" — anh ấy sẽ gọi quản lý.

53.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "Unfortunately our supplier is out of pink roses" — nhà cung cấp không thể đáp ứng đơn hàng.

54.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "pink matches our corporate logo" — logo công ty có màu hồng.

55.explanation: Sau khi người phụ nữ đề nghị giảm 10% và thay hoa hồng vàng, câu "I suppose no one will really be disappointed" ngụ ý anh ấy chấp nhận đề nghị đó.

56.explanation: Họ nói về "the shipment of the prototype motor we've been developing" và "components... are failing initial tests" — công ty sản xuất (manufacturing).

57.explanation: "We'll need to push back the shipment... we won't be able to make the delivery deadline" — vấn đề là việc giao hàng bị trì hoãn.

58.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "I'd like the development team to start giving me daily briefings about progress" — yêu cầu báo cáo cập nhật hằng ngày từ nhóm.

59.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói về Central Airport: "there's a personnel shortage" — sân bay không đủ người làm việc.

60.explanation: Sau khi nghe "We have started running an airport shuttle this morning", anh ấy nói "That's good news" — vì có thể đi xe đưa đón về khách sạn.

61.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "What's your reservation number? I'll ensure that your room is ready for you when you arrive" — cô ấy sẽ đảm bảo phòng được chuẩn bị sẵn.

62.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "my outline of the design project... I emailed it to you yesterday" — hôm qua anh ấy đã gửi bản kế hoạch/thiết kế.

63.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "I really liked your idea of opening up the kitchen and creating an open space with the living room" — cô ấy thích thiết kế không gian mở.

64.explanation: Cô ấy nói "I don't like the ceramic tiles... I like the marble ones much better"; theo bảng giá, Marble Tile là $6.50.

65.explanation: Người đàn ông nói "I'd like to make a reservation for a group of clients... I need eight rooms" — gọi để đặt phòng theo nhóm.

66.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "The type of room I recommend for you is normally 99 euros per night"; theo bảng giá, phòng €99 là Standard king.

67.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "We have an event planner here who will be able to help you. His name is Pablo Gonzales" — anh ấy là người tổ chức sự kiện.

68.explanation: Cuộc hội thoại xoay quanh "submit nominees for this year's award for outstanding employee" — nói về một giải thưởng.

69.explanation: Người phụ nữ nói "I'll have to follow up with the managers and let them know the deadline is coming up" — cô ấy sẽ nhắc nhở đội ngũ quản lý.

70.explanation: Người đàn ông nói về "the customer service representatives with the most five-star reviews... someone who was really outstanding"; theo biểu đồ, Rebecca có nhiều đánh giá 5 sao nhất (~470).

transcripts.text:
W: Hello, Forest Grove Photography Services. How can I help you?
M: Hi, I'd like to get a photographer to cover our event. It's a charity basketball game next Tuesday night. I was hoping to get Thomas Zukowski. He works for you, right?
W: Yes, but unfortunately Thomas doesn't usually work evenings.
M: Oh, too bad. Could you recommend somebody else?
W: Before I do that, let me talk to him. He might make an exception — Tom does love basketball.

W: Good morning. It looks like we received a lot of new orders online last night.
M: Yes, I saw that when I got in this morning.
W: Can you package all of them by yourself?
M: Well, there are so many, I may not be able to finish everything today.
W: OK, I'll call Maria Jeong and ask if she can come in early today to help.
M: That'd be great. We also have to pack that big shipment for the Henderson order. We finally got all of the items in.
W: Oh, yes. Do that first.

M: Haruna, we've planned most of the details for the corporate retreat, including housing and most activities. But we still need to decide where to go for Saturday's closing dinner.
W: Yes, I sent you several menus. Did you like any of the places?
M: McNally's is close by.
W: Yes, that would be convenient. We could even walk there from the hotel. But the prices are a little high.
M: I agree.
W: But I could see if they can offer us a reduced catering rate rather than ordering off the regular menu.

M1: Janelle and Rico, could you give me an update on how our new medical records software is coming?
W: Sure. Per the customer's request, I've updated the logo and changed the font.
M2: The customer has communicated with us a lot on this project. Having their feedback at every stage of the process has been helpful.
M1: Excellent. It sounds like we're on schedule for completing our beta version. Then we can hand it off to our marketing team.

M: Hello, this is Ian Nelson from Regal Bathrooms. I'm following up to make sure that you're pleased with the job our workers did in your house.
W: Thank you for calling. Yes, they did a great job. The bathroom floor was replaced and the new tile looks great. I'm very happy with the job.
M: That's good to hear. If there are other jobs you need done, I hope you'll reach out to us again.
W: That reminds me — I was thinking of replacing my kitchen cabinets. Is that something you'd possibly do?
M: We don't, but I can recommend a company I often work with. Their customers have been very satisfied. Let me get their phone number, one second.
W: Thanks.

W: My name is Laura. I refill my medication here at this pharmacy once a month. But on Monday, I'm going to travel abroad for work for two months, and I wonder if I can get a two-month refill this time.
M: It shouldn't be a problem. However, your doctor must send us the two-month prescription, so you need to contact her first.
W: Oh, I see. I'll give her a call during my lunch break today. When are you open until today?
M: Until 9 P.M. But once we receive your doctor's prescription, we can deliver the medication directly to your home.

M: Miller's Sporting Goods, Joey speaking.
W: Hello, I'm calling from West End High School. We're looking to make a big purchase for our student baseball teams. Our equipment is getting old, and we would like to get new uniforms too. We have budget restrictions, though.
M: Well, we do offer discounts for bulk purchases, and we have a number of price ranges for uniforms — many are very reasonable. Let me get the manager on the phone and you can discuss the specifics.

W: Hi, this is Gemini Flowers. I'm calling about the order you placed for your award luncheon on July twelfth. Unfortunately, our supplier is out of pink roses.
M: Oh, no. Pink matches our corporate logo. I ordered them especially for this occasion.
W: I understand your disappointment, sir. I can offer a ten percent discount on the total cost of your order and replace the pink roses with yellow ones.
M: Well, I didn't tell anyone about the roses. I suppose no one will really be disappointed.

W1: Unfortunately, our development team has some bad news. It turns out we'll need to push back the shipment of the prototype motor we've been developing for our client.
M: Why will there be a delay?
W1: Well, some of the components we received to build the prototype are failing initial tests, so we won't be able to make the delivery deadline.
M: Janet, could you let the client know?
W2: Yes, I'll contact them right away.
M: And I'd like the development team to start giving me daily briefings about progress on this issue.

W: Good evening, Legend Hotel. How may I help you?
M: Hello, I'm at the local airport. Does the hotel run shuttle buses to here?
W: We usually don't, but was your flight originally scheduled for Central Airport?
M: It was, but apparently there's a problem at Central.
W: Yes, there's a personnel shortage, and several flights have been rerouted to the local airport. We have started running an airport shuttle this morning.
M: OK, that's good news. When is the next shuttle?
W: Buses run every half hour. What's your reservation number? I'll ensure that your room is ready for you when you arrive.

M: Hi, Marla. I'm calling to check whether you received my outline of the design project for your apartment remodeling. I emailed it to you yesterday.
W: Yes, thank you for doing such a great job. I really liked your idea of opening up the kitchen and creating an open space with the living room.
M: Great. If everything looks good to you, I can start ordering the supplies tomorrow.
W: Actually, I don't like the ceramic tiles you picked for the kitchen. I like the marble ones much better. I know they are more expensive, but it's a small space.

M: Hi, I'd like to make a reservation for a group of clients that will be visiting our company from the first to the sixth of June. I need eight rooms.
W: We do have availability for that period. The type of room I recommend for you is normally 99 euros per night, but we can offer a group discount.
M: That'll work. Also, on June fifth we want to take our clients on a tour of the local attractions. Could you help arrange that?
W: We have an event planner here who will be able to help you. His name is Pablo Gonzales. I'll connect you to his office once I've completed your reservation.

M: Hi, Joanna. The management group needs to submit nominees for this year's award for outstanding employee. My supervisor wants to know if any managers have nominated anyone yet.
W: Not yet, Charles. I emailed everyone about it a week ago, but I haven't heard anything yet. I'll have to follow up with the managers and let them know the deadline is coming up.
M: OK. Well, I printed out a breakdown of the customer service representatives with the most five-star reviews from customers last year. We had someone who was really outstanding.
W: Those are excellent numbers. Could you go ahead and submit a nomination?
